title: Who will win the 2026 South Carolina Republican Senate special primary?

current.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 68%, modal YES) — staying out.
current.rationale_summary: Graham Nordone is currently the heavy favorite due to her familial ties to Lindsay Graham and endorsement from Trump, which aligns with historical patterns where prominent endorsements influence primary outcomes.
